items.story_excerpt: I run GrowthSpree, a B2B SaaS marketing agency, selling into the US and Europe. items.story_excerpt: I am a frontend engineer and actively use AI. I caught myself that i never write code manually, only if i have to tweak some styling. I feel lazy and dumb compared to pre-AI era. Even if i have to write some small changes in code that take like 2 minutes - it is easier to spend those 2 minutes explaining everything in details to AI and point out what and how

items.story_excerpt: I’ve been building Sidereon, an MIT-licensed GNSS positioning and astrodynamics engine. The submission is a browser demo running the Rust core client-side through WASM. Source for this: https://github.com/neilberkman/sidereon The idea is one engine for both the receiver and spacecraft sides: SPP/RTK/PPP, RINEX/RTCM/NTRIP, Galileo HAS/SSR, GNSS/INS fusion, SG
